story.soThat: schema değişiklikleri deploy ile birlikte apply edilsin
story.tasks: Task 1: Configure migration command in CD pipelines (AC: #1) Task 2: Implement migration failure handling (AC: #2) Task 3: Implement migration lock mechanism (AC: #3) Task 4: Enable migration history tracking (AC: #4) Task 5: Create dry-run option (AC: #5)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Migration command: `npx prisma migrate deploy` implemented in CD pipelines 2. CD pipeline'da migration step: - Before app deployment - Failure → rollback, don't deploy app 3. Migration lock (prevent concurrent migrations) implemented 4. Migration history tracking enabled 5. Dry-run option (manual trigger) available

doc.title: Epic 11: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want migrations automated in CI/CD, so that schema değişiklikleri deploy ile birlikte apply edilsin. Acceptance Criteria: Migration command: npx prisma migrate deploy, CD pipeline'da migration step: Before app deployment, Failure → rollback, Migration lock, Migration history tracking, Dry-run option

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: Migration command: npx prisma migrate deploy, Production-safe migration execution, Idempotent migrations (safe to run multiple times), Migration step in CD pipeline (before app deployment), Failure handling: rollback if migration fails, Migration lock: prevent concurrent migrations, Migration history tracking, Down migrations available, Transaction support: wrapped in DB transactions

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: interface MigrationExecution { migrationId: string; command: "npx prisma migrate deploy"; environment: "staging" | "production"; timeout: 30000; rollbackCommand?: "npx prisma migrate reset"; successCriteria: { schemaUpdated: boolean; healthCheckPass: boolean; applicationResponsive: boolean; } }

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: Run Database Migrations → Health Check Validation → If Pass: Mark Staging Ready, If Fail: Rollback. For production, Run Database Migrations → Health Check Validation → Smoke Tests. Database migration execution: < 2 minutes (per migration batch)

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Minimum Coverage: 70% (enforced by CI/CD). Coverage Breakdown: Utilities: 100%, Services: 80%+, Controllers: 70%+, Repositories: 70%+. Test Levels: Unit Testing, Integration Testing, E2E Testing, Infrastructure Testing, Performance Testing, Security Testing

doc.title: Story 11.4: CD Pipeline (Production)
doc.section: Dev Notes - Learnings from Previous Story
doc.snippet: Prisma migrate deploy already integrated in production CD pipeline [cd-production.yml:113-129], Migration failure handling: Automatic rollback on failure, Health check validation after migration, Staging pipeline has same migration pattern [cd-staging.yml] (Story 11-3), Migration automation is direct extension of existing CD pipeline

file.reason: Contains Prisma migrate deploy integration in staging deployment
Contains Prisma migrate deploy integration in production deployment with manual approval
Implements migration failure handling with automatic rollback on failure
Health check validation after migration using /health endpoint
Multi-stage Docker build for production deployment from Story 11-1
Health check endpoint used for post-migration validation (Epic 7)

node.purpose: Database schema management and migration tooling

github-actions.purpose: Docker image build and push for CD pipelines

story-context.constraints: Must use `npx prisma migrate deploy` for production-safe migration execution. Migration must execute before app deployment in CD pipeline. Migration failure must trigger automatic rollback. Migration lock must prevent concurrent migration execution. All migrations must be idempotent and wrapped in database transactions. Health check validation required after migration execution. Migration history must be maintained for audit purposes. GitHub Actions workflows must use Node.js 20.x LTS runtime. Docker multi-stage build must be used for containerized deployment. Migration dry-run capability required for manual validation.

interface.name: MigrationExecution
CI Pipeline API
CD Pipeline API

tests.standards: Testing Strategy requires minimum 70% test coverage enforced by CI/CD. Unit tests for individual services/modules using Jest with Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Integration tests for API endpoints, database operations, and external service integration using Jest, SuperTest, and TestContainers. E2E tests for complete CI/CD workflow validation. Infrastructure tests for Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment processes. Security tests for container security, dependency vulnerabilities, and secrets handling. Performance tests for CI/CD pipeline performance and container performance. Mock factories and test utilities available for consistent test data generation.
tests.locations: Unit tests: tests/unit/ or src/**/*.test.ts Integration tests: tests/integration/ or test/*.e2e-spec.ts E2E tests: tests/e2e/ or test/*.e2e-spec.ts Test utilities: tests/factories/, test/setup.ts Test configuration: jest.config.js, jest-e2e.json

test.name: Migration Command Execution
test.description: Verify that npx prisma migrate deploy executes successfully in both staging and production CD pipelines

test.name: Migration Failure Handling
test.description: Test that migration failure triggers automatic rollback and prevents app deployment in both staging and production

test.name: Migration Pre-Deployment
test.description: Verify that migration step executes before app container deployment in CD pipeline

test.name: Migration Lock Mechanism
test.description: Test that concurrent migration attempts are prevented via lock file or database-level lock

test.name: Lock File Cleanup
test.description: Verify that lock file is removed after successful migration and cleaned up on failure with timeout

test.name: Migration History Tracking
test.description: Verify that Prisma migration history (_Prisma_migrations table) is properly maintained and logged in CI/CD

test.name: Migration Dry-Run
test.description: Test that manual dry-run workflow validates migrations without applying them to the database

test.name: Health Check Post-Migration
test.description: Verify that /health endpoint responds successfully after migration execution

test.name: Rollback on Health Check Failure
test.description: Test that container rollback occurs when health check fails after migration

test.name: Idempotent Migration Execution
test.description: Verify that migrations are safe to run multiple times without data corruption
